[Helper] Convert a Gmail message into a Google Tasks entry

Usage: gws +email-to-task [OPTIONS] --message-id <ID>

Options:
      --message-id <ID>      Gmail message ID to convert
      --sanitize <TEMPLATE>  Sanitize API responses through a Model Armor template. Requires cloud-platform scope. Format: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE. Also reads GWS_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE env var.
      --dry-run              Validate the request locally without sending it to the API
      --tasklist <ID>        Task list ID (default: @default) [default: @default]
      --format <FORMAT>      Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
  -h, --help                 Print help

EXAMPLES:
  gws workflow +email-to-task --message-id MSG_ID
  gws workflow +email-to-task --message-id MSG_ID --tasklist LIST_ID

TIPS:
  Reads the email subject as the task title and snippet as notes.
  Creates a new task — confirm with the user before executing.
